about.title: About Shrimp

facts.label: M E
facts.value: A developer curious about both life and code

facts.label: Goal
facts.value: Write ideas down and live with clarity

facts.label: Trait
facts.value: Interest-driven — hard to stop once started

facts.label: Hobbies
facts.value: Coding, city walks, cooking, casual photography

paragraphs: Maple's Blog is where I keep life fragments and technical notes. Tech posts cover stack choices, dev pitfalls, and small tips. Life posts might be weekend walks, kitchen experiments, or moments worth keeping.
I built this site because notes were scattered across apps and short-form content wasn't enough. I wanted a place to write slowly and revise freely — like tidying a room for my thoughts.
If you enjoy unhurried blogs like this, feel free to visit often. Leave a comment on any post — I'll reply when I can.
